headline: 3 AgTech & Food Innovation Picks Riding on Structural Growth Trends
summary: In the evolving AgTech & Food Innovation space, ADM, BYND and INGR are moving beyond traditional commodity models, using science and technology to pursue higher-value growth.

headline: Amerequip Transforms 100 Years of Engineering Data into Actionable Intelligence with CADDi AI Data Platform
summary: CHICAGO, March 19, 2026--Single-search workflow unifies Amerequip engineering & quality teams with CADDi AI Data Platform – connecting data & assets into one accessible system
